narrative:
Jasper (precinct in Fayette County) has 443 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.4 percentage points.
